issues.description: OnPlay effect uses 'Unblockable' keyword, but card text says 'can also attack active Characters' — should grant ability to attack active Characters, not unblockable. Keyword choice is mechanically wrong.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn' — should be 'DuringYourTurn' per duration rules.
OnAttack effect includes 'PlayFromHand' action, but card text does not allow playing cards — it allows placing 2 trash cards at bottom of deck. This action should not exist.
PlayFromHand filter references 'Character' but the actual effect is placing trash cards at deck bottom (requires SearchDeck or similar mechanic), not playing from hand.
PowerBoost duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text specifies 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' — should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or extended duration matching opponent's turn end.
